ranked_jobs.title: Product Manager, Commerce Systems
why: Role focuses on harmonizing and consolidating large-scale backend systems and platform infrastructure, aligning with enterprise platform transformation and system consolidation.
Emphasis on building unified control planes and reducing integration friction matches experience in platform modernization.
Role is remote and based in major hubs, fitting candidate preference for remote work.
Involvement with cross-functional leadership and strategic planning aligns with high-level platform transformation responsibilities.

ranked_jobs.title: Credit Risk Program Manager, Risk Foundations
why: Role focuses on designing systems, policies, and processes for credit risk at scale, indicating enterprise platform and operating model work.
Involves partnering with cross-functional teams including Risk Strategy, Product, Engineering, and Operations, indicating broad enterprise impact.
Emphasis on orchestrating strategic commercial shifts and scalable risk-wide frameworks aligns with platform transformation and modernization.
Role is execution-oriented and involves leading complex, cross-functional initiatives with a focus on governance and scalable risk management.
The position is fully remote, which aligns well with preferred work arrangements.

ranked_jobs.title: Strategy & Operations Program Manager, Risk Ops
why: Role involves leading complex global programs impacting operational excellence within Risk Operations, which relates to enterprise-wide operational transformation
Collaboration across multiple cross-functional teams including Risk Product, Risk Engineering, Policy, and Data Science indicates broad scope
Fully remote role in the US, which aligns with preferred remote work criteria
Strong focus on strategic initiatives and operational process improvements which are central to platform transformation and governance

ranked_jobs.title: AI Delivery Lead
why: Role focuses on AI adoption and operational integration across multiple products and state programs, indicating enterprise-wide scope.
Involves organization and governance of AI initiatives, including SOPs and guidelines, which aligns with governance and operating model responsibilities.
Supports communication, training, and adoption, which is important for enterprise transformation and change management.
Remote role, which fits preference for remote work.

ranked_jobs.title: AI Transformation & Operations Lead
why: Role involves bridging operational reality and technological capabilities within Claims organization, indicating some operational leadership.
Focus on extending impact of existing tools and identifying new technical development opportunities suggests involvement in platform enhancement.
Responsibilities include ensuring seamless collaboration between AI systems and claims staff, implying some degree of operating model adaptation.
